title: Hat command
body:
*serverside*

This mod just adds `/hat` command that will put your hand item in the head! </br>
If you want a version where you can just put a hat in a helmet slot, use this mod instead: [Server-Hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-hats) </br>
You can add new translations: [Wiki page](https://github.com/AquUpd/hat-command/wiki/Translations) </br>

if you need 1.16 version check this mod: https://github.com/PotatoPresident/simplehat

There's support for permissions plugin (Like LuckPerms)
### Screenshots:
![image1](https://i.imgur.com/TffjsLx.png)
![image2](https://i.imgur.com/jeguyBD.png)
### Permissions
* Usage of the command: </br>
`aqupdhat.hat.usage`
* Bypass "Curse Of Binding" on your head: </br>
`aqupdhat.hat.bypassbinding`

### Translations
* AqUpd - Russian and English.
* elhertz - Spanish
* MeiaQuatru - Portuguese
